Container.Name: acurast-signer
Container.Overview:
Polkadot extrinsic signing sidecar for Acurast staking.
Runs as a lightweight HTTP service on port 3200 (inter-container only — no host port binding). Accepts signed POST /submit requests from the NanoClaw agent container to compound staking rewards on the Acurast mainnet without exposing the mnemonic to the agent.
Secrets are read from Docker secrets files at /run/secrets/mnemonic and /run/secrets/hmac-token — never from environment variables.
The service will refuse to start if either secret file is missing or empty.

Config.Name: Mnemonic Secret
Config.Description: Required. Host file containing the SR25519 mnemonic phrase for the Acurast signing keypair. Must be a plain-text file containing only the mnemonic. Never stored in an environment variable.

Config.Name: HMAC Token Secret
Config.Description: Required. Host file containing the shared HMAC token used to authenticate POST /submit requests from NanoClaw. Must match the ACURAST_HMAC_TOKEN value configured in NanoClaw.
